CREATE TABLE events (event_id Int32, event_time String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY event_id;
SELECT event_id, parseDateTime64BestEffortOrNull(event_time, 6) AS parsed_event_time FROM events WHERE event_id IN (SELECT event_id FROM events WHERE event_time LIKE '2023%');
WITH (SELECT parseDateTime64BestEffortOrNull('2022-01-01 12:00:00.111111', 6)) AS dt1, (SELECT parseDateTime64BestEffortOrNull('not_a_date', 6)) AS dt2 SELECT dt1, dt2;
WITH (SELECT parseDateTime64BestEffortOrNull(event_time, 6) FROM test_date_time WHERE event_time LIKE '2023%') AS parsed_times SELECT COUNT(*) FROM parsed_times WHERE parsed_times IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE log_dates (log_id Int32, log_date String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY log_id;
SELECT log_id, parseDateTime64BestEffortOrNull(log_date, 6) AS processed_date FROM log_dates WHERE log_id >= 1;
CREATE TABLE joined_dates (id Int32, date_str String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT jd.id, parseDateTime64BestEffortOrNull(jd.date_str, 6) FROM joined_dates AS jd JOIN events AS e ON e.event_id = jd.id;
